ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., MILP, BF, BPS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_sizes" (
  "problem_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem size */,
  "problem_size" INTEGER /* Size of the problem (e.g., number of variables, constraints) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem size */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of problem (e.g., linear, nonlinear) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem size was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the problem size */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm configuration */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., default, custom) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_configs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., time, memory) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "problem_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem size */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm configuration */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_problem_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_size_id") REFERENCES problem_sizes ("problem_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES algorithm_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "problem_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem size */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm configuration */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the result was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the upload */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upload was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the upload */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upload was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_problem_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_size_id") REFERENCES problem_sizes ("problem_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES algorithm_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_size_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem size version */,
  "problem_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem size */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem size version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem size version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the problem size version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem size version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem size version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the problem size version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem size version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_size_versions_problem_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_size_id") REFERENCES problem_sizes ("problem_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES algorithm_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the result version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the result version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload version */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the upload version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the upload version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the upload version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the upload version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upload version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the upload version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the upload version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_versions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES uploads ("upload_id")
)
